name: lists
description: General-purpose named lists for tracking jobs, tasks, reading, shopping, or anything else. Items have custom statuses beyond done/not-done.

tools.name: create_list
tools.description: Create a named list (e.g., 'Job Pipeline', 'Grocery', 'Reading List'). Raises an error if the name already exists.

description.description: Optional description of the list's purpose.

tools.name: add_to_list
tools.description: Add an item to a named list. Creates the list automatically if it doesn't exist.

list_name.description: The name of the list to add to.

label.description: The item label (e.g., 'Head of Product — Anthropic (SF/Remote)').

status.description: Initial status for the item (e.g., 'open', 'interested', 'applied'). Defaults to 'open'.

metadata.description: Optional JSON metadata for the item (e.g., {"company": "Anthropic", "url": "...", "ref_id": "..."}).

tools.name: remove_from_list
tools.description: Remove an item from a list by fuzzy name match. Hard-deletes the item.

item.description: A fragment of the item label to fuzzy-match (e.g., 'ScaleAI' or 'Anthropic').

tools.name: update_list_item
tools.description: Update an item's status, label, or metadata by fuzzy name match (e.g., mark as 'applied', 'interviewing', 'rejected').

item.description: A fragment of the item label to fuzzy-match.

metadata.description: New metadata to replace existing metadata.

tools.name: show_list
tools.description: Show all items in a named list, with status counts. Optionally filter to a specific status.

status_filter.description: Optional: only show items with this status (e.g., 'applied').
